ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meets" (
  "meet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meet */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the meet */,
  "meet_name" TEXT /* Name or title of the meet */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the meet */,
  "coach_info_sheet" TEXT /* Link or path to the coach's info sheet */,
  "course_map" TEXT /* Link or path to the course map */,
  "bus_race_schedule" TEXT /* Bus and race schedule for the meet */,
  "results" TEXT /* Link or path to the results and statistics */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions on the day of the meet */,
  "estimated_participants" INTEGER /* Estimated number of participants */,
  "actual_participants" INTEGER /* Actual number of participants */,
  "course_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the course */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the meet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meets_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* List of available facilities */,
  "parking_capacity" INTEGER /* Parking capacity */,
  "parking_fees" TEXT /* Parking fees */,
  "accessible" INTEGER /* Accessibility for people with disabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach is managing */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* List of certifications */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "school" TEXT /* School the team represents */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach managing the team */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Path to the team's logo */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Team color */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the team's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Name of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade level of the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the athlete */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "injuries" TEXT /* List of current or past injuries */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* List of medical conditions */,
  "profile_photo" TEXT /* Path to the athlete's profile photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meet_participants" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation entry */,
  "meet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meet */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "participation_status" TEXT /* Status of the athlete's participation (e.g., confirmed, pending, absent) */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the athlete */,
  "uniform_number" TEXT /* Uniform number of the athlete */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the athlete's participation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meet_participants_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meet_participants_meet_id FOREIGN KEY ("meet_id") REFERENCES meets ("meet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bus_schedules" (
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus */,
  "meet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meet */,
  "bus_number" TEXT /* Number or name of the bus */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Time the bus departs */,
  "return_time" TEXT /* Time the bus returns */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the bus driver */,
  "bus_type" TEXT /* Type of bus (e.g., school bus, charter bus) */,
  "bus_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the bus */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the bus schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_schedules_meet_id FOREIGN KEY ("meet_id") REFERENCES meets ("meet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bus_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus assignment */,
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bus */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number assigned to the athlete */,
  "assigned_seat" TEXT /* Assigned seat number */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the bus assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_assignments_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_assignments_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES bus_schedules ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_schedules" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "meet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meet */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the race */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the race */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of race (e.g., 5K, 10K) */,
  "race_distance" TEXT /* Distance of the race */,
  "race_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions during the race (e.g., weather, terrain) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the race schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_schedules_meet_id FOREIGN KEY ("meet_id") REFERENCES meets ("meet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place of the athlete in the race */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken by the athlete to complete the race */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., finished, disqualified, did not start) */,
  "split_times" TEXT /* Split times during the race */,
  "pace" TEXT /* Pace of the athlete */,
  "pr" INTEGER /* Indicates if the athlete achieved a personal record */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES race_schedules ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_description" TEXT /* Description of the statistic */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., individual, team) */,
  "stat_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the statistic */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES race_schedules ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, administrator, athlete) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., meet, race, result) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
